query: Our shared <Button> component needs a new 'danger' variant. Update it.
expected_behavior: Declares the blast radius before touching the component: lists all pages/flows that consume <Button>
Adds the 'danger' variant using a discriminated union or variant prop pattern, not a new class string
Does not change any existing variant behavior while adding the new one
Does not reformat unrelated code in the same file
Specifies the Hover and Click states for the new 'danger' variant
